SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation

Interface AIiDocumentationElement

All Known Subinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationCodeBlock, AIiDocumentationContainerElement, AIiDocumentationDocument, AIiDocumentationLink, AIiDocumentationParagraph, AIiDocumentationSection, AIiDocumentationTable, AIiDocumentationTableCell, AIiDocumentationTableColumn, AIiDocumentationTableRow
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationCodeBlock, AIcDocumentationContainerElement, AIcDocumentationDocument, AIcDocumentationElement, AIcDocumentationLink, AIcDocumentationParagraph, AIcDocumentationSection, AIcDocumentationTable, AIcDocumentationTableCell, AIcDocumentationTableColumn, AIcDocumentationTableRow
public interface AIiDocumentationElement
Represents a common documentation AST element.

Each element has a stable element identifier and optional string metadata. The element identifier can be used by renderers for anchors, cross-links, diagnostics, or source mapping.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getElementId()
    Returns the stable identifier of this documentation element.
    Map<String,String>
    getMetadata()
    Returns metadata associated with this documentation element.
    String
    getMetadataValue(String aKey)
    Returns a single metadata value.
    void
    putMetadataValue(String aKey, String aValue)
    Adds or replaces a metadata value.
    void
    removeMetadataValue(String aKey)
    Removes a metadata value.

  • Method Details

    • getElementId

      String getElementId()
      Returns the stable identifier of this documentation element.
      Returns:
      stable element identifier

    • getMetadata

      Map<String,String> getMetadata()
      Returns metadata associated with this documentation element.

      Implementations should return a read-only view unless mutability is explicitly part of the implementation contract.

      Returns:
      element metadata keyed by metadata name

    • getMetadataValue

      String getMetadataValue(String aKey)
      Returns a single metadata value.
      Parameters:
      aKey - metadata key
      Returns:
      metadata value, or null if no value exists for the key

    • putMetadataValue

      void putMetadataValue(String aKey, String aValue)
      Adds or replaces a metadata value.
      Parameters:
      aKey - metadata key
      aValue - metadata value

    • removeMetadataValue

      void removeMetadataValue(String aKey)
      Removes a metadata value.
      Parameters:
      aKey - metadata key
